dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION 2.1 Use Only in Medtronic SynchroMed ® Programmable Pump (or other pumps labeled for intrathecal administration of GABLOFEN) GABLOFEN is approved only for use with the Medtronic SynchroMed ® Programmable Pump or other pumps labeled for intrathecal administration of GABLOFEN.
